title: melica ciliata var. elata
intro: Melica ciliata var. elata, also known as a variant of melic grass, is a plant species belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Melica ciliata var. elata include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a variety of ways.
